zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim於1177年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼時，她的父親William de Braose24歲，母親Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber22歲。她於1195年11月與Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1255年11月17日在英國英格蘭賀福爾維奧布利享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾阿可波瑞。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim was born in 1177, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, William de Braose, was 24 and her mother, Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, was 22. She married Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath in November 1195, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 17 November 1255, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Aconbury, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim est née en 1177, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Braose, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath en novembre 1195, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 novembre 1255, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Aconbury, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat im November 1195 in Herefordshire, England Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. November 1255 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Aconbury, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Braose Lady of Trimが1177年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで生まれた時，父William de Braoseは24歳，母Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramberは22歳であった。1195年11月にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでWalter de Lacy Lord of Meathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1255年11月17日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアコンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim(이)가 1177년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Braose(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1195년 11월 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1255년 11월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 베오블리에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 악버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim родилась в 1177 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Braose было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath ноябрь 1195 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 17 ноября 1255 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности аконбури, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath en noviembre de 1195, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de noviembre de 1255, en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Aconbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
